metadata.description: An ICM-structured workspace and skill bundle for turning any job post into a tailored, ATS-ready CV, cover letter, and form answers — grounded in your own master CV, never invented.

plugins.name: job-application
plugins.description: Scaffold an ICM job-application workspace and run a one-command tailoring pipeline (score → CV → letter → form answers), with optional Google Drive sync and Obsidian vault integration.
